style_summary: Cool, desaturated tones with lifted shadows, subtle contrast, and a muted color palette that evokes a calm, documentary mood.

facets.exposure: slightly lifted exposure with soft overall brightness
facets.contrast: subtle contrast with a restrained tonal curve
facets.white_balance: cool white balance with understated warmth removal
facets.saturation: muted saturation and desaturated color treatment
facets.highlight_handling: keep highlights controlled and avoid glossy brightness spikes
facets.shadow_handling: lift shadows gently without flattening the frame
facets.scene_tendency: leans toward calm interior and overcast exterior rendering when present

composed_prompt: Cool, desaturated tones with lifted shadows, subtle contrast, and a muted color palette that evokes a calm, documentary mood. Exposure: slightly lifted exposure with soft overall brightness. Contrast: subtle contrast with a restrained tonal curve. White balance: cool white balance with understated warmth removal. Saturation: muted saturation and desaturated color treatment. Highlight handling: keep highlights controlled and avoid glossy brightness spikes. Shadow handling: lift shadows gently without flattening the frame. Scene tendency: leans toward calm interior and overcast exterior rendering when present. Mood: calm, restrained, documentary.
